selected_markets.title: Will the high temp in Chicago be <46° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Mid-probability of 0.495 adjusted downward by enrich_bias of 0.0408, suggesting slight overpricing of YES. February 14 Chicago high temps historically average ~29°F with typical highs around 35-40°F, making sub-46° quite likely but not certain. Low volume (458) reduces confidence in market efficiency.
